/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/unit/smoke_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/unit/domain_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/unit/preset_schema_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/unit/pdf_test.cpp.o -o unit_tests  ../src/common/libprintguard_common.a ../src/domain/libprintguard_domain.a ../src/pdf/libprintguard_pdf.a ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Maind.a ../src/common/libprintguard_common.a ../_deps/spdlog-build/libspdlogd.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libqpdf.so.29.9.0 ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2d.a
